steps.title: Read the model value
steps.content: At an elevation of $8{,}500$ feet, the line of best fit is at about $39$ degrees Fahrenheit.

steps.title: Check with two points
steps.content: Using points on the line, such as $(6000,44)$ and $(9000,38)$, the prediction near $8{,}500$ feet is closest to $39$ degrees Fahrenheit. The answer is B.
